name: Barbecued Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Pepper (jalapeno), seeded and very finely chopped
2 cans Navy beans (15 oz each), drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, heat 1 tablespoon oil over medium heat.
2. Add onions, jalapenos, and garlic; sauté for about 2 minutes, or until softened but not browned.
3. Stir in maple syrup, tomato paste, mustard, chili powder, Worcestershire sauce, and 1/3 cup vinegar.
4. Simmer, stirring often, for about 15 minutes, or until thickened.
5. Let cool. Stir in the remaining 1/3 cup vinegar, 1 tablespoon oil, and vegetable stock.
6. In a large bowl, combine beans, cucumbers, and scallions.
7. Pour the vinegar mixture over and toss until all ingredients are coated.
8. Season with salt and pepper. Serves 4 as a main dish; 6 as a side dish.
Per serving: 259 cal; 12 g protein; 5 g fat; 44 g carb; 229 mg sod; 0 mg chol
Adapted from a recipe in Eating Well, July-Aug 1993/MM by DEEANNE
